requirement: At least one evidence estimator must be independent of the chain-local Laplace proxy/formal cross-check lineage.
minimum_artifact: estimator config, raw run log, result JSON/CSV, acceptance markdown
claim_unlocked_if_met: candidate external evidence language only after result gate

requirement: DEU and native sides must use the same full-objective likelihood set; TT_lite remains excluded unless a separate matched TT_lite-inclusive branch is run.
Evidence/BF result must be tested against predeclared prior-volume variants.
minimum_artifact: prior sensitivity plan and result table

requirement: Input chain files, parameter columns, priors, likelihood scope, and reference values must be frozen in manifests.
Independent validation execution must be followed by a separate result gate before any claim language is upgraded.
claim_unlocked_if_met: internal or external language depending on outcome

requirement: Publication-style language must remain blocked until independent validation and final claim-lock stages are booked.
claim_unlocked_if_met: none at this stage; this is a guardrail
